notes: Most often used for fleet maintenance, repair and service applications
Lift unit translates to the rear approximately 36 1/8" during vertical articulation
Use smooth electrical 90's in conduits, not plumbing 90's
Concrete floor must have minimum strength of 4000 psi and be at least 6 inches thick
Materials shown on list shall be used without substitution unless specifically approved in writing by Mohawk Resources, Ltd

pages_summary.description: General installation notes and surface lift specifications
pages_summary.extracted_text: GENERAL NOTES, NOTE 1, IF THE EXISTING CONCRETE FLOOR HAS A DOCUMENTED MINIMUM STRENGTH OF NOT LESS THAN f'c= 4,000 psi AND IS AT LEAST 6 INCHES THICK, THEN THE FLOOR SYSTEM MAY BE USED WITHOUT ALTERATION, PROVIDED ANY FLOOR AREA WHICH IS DESIGNED FOR VEHICLES OR THE SAME WEIGHT AS THE LIFT UNIT MAXIMUM CAPACITY WILL BE ADEQUATE FOR INSTALLATION OF THE LIFT UNIT. LIFT UNIT CONTACT PRESSURES WILL BE EQUAL TO OR LESS THAN THE WHEEL CONTACT PRESSURES, SURFACE LIFTS ONLY, NOTICE OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
